characters.name: Admiral Grimitz
characters.description: Admiral GrimitzRegularVHS ArtSpeciesDogGenderMaleAlignmentNeutralOther InformationVoiced ByPeter CullenAdmiral Grimitzis a minorDuckTales 1987character. Grimitz is the commanding officer of the aircraft carrier to whichDonald Duckis assigned while serving in the navy, and appears alongside Donald throughout season one. His temper is often tested by Donald's accident-prone stunts, although Grimitz has certain peculiar character traits himself – most notably how he likes to play with military equipment that makes things "go kablooey". His temper is often tested by Donald's accident-prone stunts, although Grimitz has certain peculiar character traits himself – most notably how he likes to play with military equipment that makes things "go kablooey".

characters.name: Air Pirates
characters.description: Air PiratesAlignmentBadEnemiesHuey, Dewey, and Louie DuckLaunchpad McQuackWebbyScrooge McDuckOther InformationFirst AppearanceSky Pirates...in the Sky!Voiced BySam Riegel(Stinky Boot,No-Name the Nameless Parrot,Two-Toed Jack, andPirate Intern),Kimberly D. Brooks(Peg Leg Meg,Hardtack HattieandOne-Eyed Linda),Keith Ferguson(Ugly Mug)Danny PudiandBobby Moynihan(Pirate 1 and Pirate 2)TheAir Piratesare led byDon Karnageand reside on the air carrier,The Iron Vulture. In addition to Don Karnage, the band also includes first matePeg Leg Meg, the one-eyedUgly Mug, the muscularStinky Boot, the likewise muscularHardtack Hattie, the French accent twinsOne-Eyed LindaandTwo-Toed Jack,Pirate Intern, andNo-Name the Nameless Parrot, as well as several un-named pirates.

characters.name: Aletheia
characters.description: AletheiaSpeciesMermaidGenderFemaleAlignmentNeutralOther InformationFirst AppearanceThe Lost Harp of Mervana!Voiced ByHynden WalchAletheiais a member of the lost civilization of Mervana that the duck family encountered inThe Lost Harp of Mervana!She is voiced byHynden Walch. Alethia is a pink-feathered merperson, with long purple hair and green eyes. She wears a pink gown with large sleeves and has a green tail. Clickhereto view this page's gallery.

characters.name: All-Nite Movers
characters.description: All-Nite Moversis a moving company that appeared in theDuckTales (2017)episode,Let's Get Dangerous!While moving furniture one night,Darkwing Duckmistakes them for criminals and starts to fight them. When realizing his mistake however, Darkwing offers to move the furniture in their place. Clickhereto view this page's gallery.

characters.name: Ammonia Pine
characters.description: Ammonia Pine in Dangerous Currency Ammonia Pineis a female villain who is obsessed with cleanliness and an antagonist ofDarkwing Duck. According to Darkwing, she was once a normal cleaning woman who worked in a laboratory, until an accident with an experimental cleaning solvent turned her evil, and now she works for F.O.W.L. Clickhereto view this page's gallery.

characters.name: Amunet
characters.description: AmunetSpeciesJackalGenderFemaleAlignmentGoodAlliesScrooge McDuckLaunchpad McQuackWebby VanderquackHuey DuckDewey DuckLouie DuckFaris DjinnEnemiesToth-RaMoonlanders(formerly)Other InformationFirst Appearance"The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra!"Voiced ByCree SummerOther VoicesOther VoicesHilda Iliopoulou (GR)Ewa Prus (PL)Amunetis a female Egyptian Jackal introduced in theDuckTalesrebootepisode "The Living Mummies of Toth-Ra!" Amunet was born as one of theLiving Mummies, the latest generation of the followers ofToth-Ra, who wrapped themselves in bandages in honor of their ancestors. Believing themselves to be the servants of the pharaoh, they blindly accepted what they perceived to be his demands, even when they involved such unpleasantness as living next to the pyramid's dump. Amunet was so devoted that she refused to see the squalor in which the followers lived, and refused to even consider the idea of rising up against Toth-Ra when it was suggested byScrooge McDuck. However, upon being introduced to the wonder of burritos byLaunchpad McQuack, Amunet and her people were quick to rise up against their leader. Despite her eagerness, Amunet proved reluctant to embrace full-on rebellion, questioningHuey'sstrategies and admitting that she and her people would probably surrender if Toth-Ra ordered it. However, Launchpad proved the unlikely inspiration to move them to action, and they stormed Toth-Ra's pyramid, only to discover that his guard had in fact been manipulating the pharaoh's mummified remains to assert authority over them. A magic spell then revived Toth-Ra himself, and in the ensuing battle, Launchpad became injured; it fell to Amunet to rally her people to the true cause of freedom. They subsequently succeeded in returning Toth-Ra to his sleep and left the pyramid, at which point Amunet was given a pair of sunglasses to help her get used to the sun. She gifted Launchpad with a golden sickle from Toth-Ra's tomb, and Scrooge with a burrito he enjoyed to his surprise.

A magic spell then revived Toth-Ra himself, and in the ensuing battle, Launchpad became injured; it fell to Amunet to rally her people to the true cause of freedom. They subsequently succeeded in returning Toth-Ra to his sleep and left the pyramid, at which point Amunet was given a pair of sunglasses to help her get used to the sun. She gifted Launchpad with a golden sickle from Toth-Ra's tomb, and Scrooge with a burrito he enjoyed to his surprise.

characters.name: April, May and June Duck (1987)
characters.description: April, May and June Duck are the nieces of Daisy Duck and the love interest of Huey, Dewey, and Louie Duck. They are established characters within the pre-DuckTalescomics. While never appearing in the 1987DuckTalesanimated series, April, May and June have appeared in a couple ofcomic book storiesbased on the show. In 1994 he appeared in aDanishstory and in he was seen inBoom! Studios revival comicsserial "Dangerous Currency" . they made a cameo appearance while being terrorized along withLudwig Von DrakeandFlintheart GlomgoldbyNegaduck's attack onDuckburg.

characters.name: Armstrong (1987)
characters.description: ArmstrongSpeciesRobotGenderMaleAlignmentBadOther InformationVoiced ByPeter CullenArmstrongis a minorDuckTales 1987character appearing in the episode with thesame name. Armstrong is introduced asGyro Gearloose's latest invention. He is helpful for a while, until he takes overLaunchpadandDuckworth's jobs. Then he turns bad and takes over every task in the household, but a bucket of water was dumped on him, making him malfunction and fall apart.

characters.name: Babyface Beagle (1987)
characters.description: Babyface BeagleSpeciesDogGenderMaleAlignmentBadOther InformationVoiced ByTerry McGovernBabyface Beagleis one of the seven mainBeagle BoysinDuckTales 1987. His plate number is 176-167. Babyface is the youngest of theBeagle Boys, aptly named for his small size and cute appearance; he is short and tubby, but taller thanBigtime. Unlike the rest of his brothers, he is clean-shaven and he wears a unique backwards propeller hat. His red shirt is too small for him, revealing his belly, and the cuffs of his sleeves are white and frilly. He doesn't wear the traditional yellow gloves. Babyface has two small strands of hair on his head.

characters.name: Bankjob Beagle (1987)
characters.description: Bankjob BeagleSpeciesDogGenderMaleAlignmentBadOther InformationVoiced ByPeter CullenBankjob Beagleis one of the seven mainBeagle Boysin the1987DuckTalesseries. Bankjob is one of the most intelligent of theBeagle Boys, often serving as the leader of the group wheneverBigtimeandMaare absent. However, he relies more on his brute strength than his brains. He tends to be impulsive and quick to anger, but is very confident and takes pride in his position as leader.

characters.name: Beagle Babes
characters.description: The Beagle BabesGroupBabydollBouffantBoom-BoomSpeciesDogGenderFemaleAlignmentBadOther InformationVoiced BySusan Blu(Babydoll)JoAnne Worley(Bouffant)Victoria Carroll(Boom-Boom)Beagle Babesare minorDuckTales 1987characters appearing in the episode "The Good Muddahs". What the Beagle Babes, cousins of theBeagle Boys, lack in fame and success, they make up for in charm and cunning. Babydoll Beagle(776-177) is the most tomboyish of her sisters, hotheaded and impulsive. She is always quick to come up with a solution whenever there's a problem. She wears a lavender dress with a bow and has rouged cheeks.

characters.name: Beagle Brats
characters.description: The Beagle BratsSpeciesDogGenderMaleAlignmentBadOther InformationVoiced ByBrian CummingsChuck McCannTerry McGovernBeagle Bratsare minorDuckTales 1987characters appearing in the episode-segment "Take Me Out of the Ballgame". The Beagle Brats are child relatives of theBeagle Boys, and numerous of them, all unnamed, face off against theJunior Woodchucks, includingHuey, Dewey and Louie,DoofusandWebby, in a game of baseball. Coached byMa Beagle, they share the Beagle family's fondness for foul play, although eventually, they lose the game. Clickhereto view this page's gallery.
